Container.Name: milvus
Container.Overview: Milvus Standalone — open-source vector database. Backs the `memsearch` Claude Code plugin. Prerequisites before install: 1. Shared bridge network exists: `docker network create milvus-net`. 2. Garage is running and a bucket + access key have been created (see repo README). 3. milvus-etcd is running on the same network. 4. `milvus.yaml` exists at `/mnt/cache/appdata/milvus/configs/milvus.yaml` (starter in repo under config-examples/). Autostart order: Garage (1) → etcd (2) → Milvus (3) with ~10s delays between. After install: confirm health via `curl http://[UNRAID-IP]:9091/healthz`.
Container.Description: Milvus is a cloud-native, open-source vector database built to power embedding similarity search. This template runs Milvus Standalone (single-node) pointed at Garage for object storage and etcd for coordination.

Config.Name: gRPC API
Config.Description: Milvus gRPC API — pymilvus clients and memsearch connect here.

Config.Name: Health / Metrics
Config.Description: HTTP health endpoint (/healthz) and Prometheus metrics (/metrics).

Config.Name: Data
Config.Description: Milvus local data (logs, WAL, staging). Cache pool only.

Config.Name: Config
Config.Description: milvus.yaml — starter at config-examples/milvus.yaml in the template repo. Set minio.accessKeyID + secretAccessKey + bucketName to match Garage.

Config.Name: ETCD_ENDPOINTS
Config.Description: Container name of the etcd instance on milvus-net (default works with milvus-etcd template).

Config.Name: MINIO_ADDRESS
Config.Description: Object-store address. For Garage, use `garage:3900`. Milvus uses the `minio` config section for any S3-compatible backend.
